note: Metadata-only recall gold set for the research radar (issue #42/#46). Titles + DOIs are public bibliographic metadata for papers ALREADY represented by this repo's cards; no abstracts or copyrighted text are stored. Positives SHOULD be retained by the scan; negatives SHOULD be rejected. This tests RECALL (the precision-only 51-candidate fixture cannot).

positives.title: Systematically improving espresso: Insights from mass transfer modeling
Poroelastic evolution of a coffee bed during an espresso extraction
Infiltration and wetting of a dry espresso coffee bed
Permeability of a packed coffee bed and its percolation collapse

negatives.title: Solvent extraction of alkaloids from human plasma for clinical assay
Enhanced oil recovery and permeability in a sandstone reservoir
A federated IoT telemetry platform for smart-city digital twins
